content:
I wrote a detailed comparison of GitHub Actions vs Jenkins after working with both while learning DevOps.
Instead of focusing on "which one is better," I looked at questions like:

• When does GitHub Actions become enough?

• When is Jenkins still the right choice?

• Performance and scalability

• Security and maintenance

• Cost

• Real-world use cases
I'd love to hear where you disagree or what your production experience has been.

actions vs jenkins
